discovery_brief.problem_summary: Strong organic brand equity is not translating into scalable, consistent paid performance and execution cadence.
discovery_brief.goal_summary: In 90 days, establish profitable paid growth and improve monthly revenue trajectory from $180K toward $400K.
constraints: Need to preserve brand voice and trust

client_site_findings: Community-led brand voice is clear and differentiated through editorial heritage.
Paid landing page journeys can better align with trust-first creative angles and conversion intent.

competitor_findings.name: Rhode
competitor_findings.landing_page_angle: Lifestyle-led product drops and social urgency

competitor_findings.name: The Ordinary
competitor_findings.landing_page_angle: Education-first purchase path with clear claims

competitor_findings.name: Rare Beauty
competitor_findings.messaging_hook: Community-first storytelling and mission-led brand trust

meta_ad_library_findings: Trust-first UGC and social proof hooks outperform hard-sell creative for beauty audiences.
Retention channels amplify paid efficiency when flows and campaign cadences are consistent.
